title: WooCommerce Trigger fails after PHP upgrade
symptom: After upgrading PHP, the WooCommerce Trigger in n8n cannot be activated and shows a 'Header overflow' error.
root_cause: The error occurs due to a conflict with the 'Query Monitor' plugin, which interferes with the API calls made by the WooCommerce Trigger after the PHP upgrade. This plugin may alter the request headers in a way that exceeds the server's limits.
fix_steps: Clone the website to a staging environment
Reactivate plugins one by one to identify the conflict
Disable the 'Query Monitor' plugin if it causes the issue
agent_instruction: Deactivate the 'Query Monitor' plugin to resolve the WooCommerce Trigger issue.
